title: Can You Invest in SpaceX Before the IPO via ETFs? Yes, But With Fine Print
sentences: Can You Invest in SpaceX Before the IPO via ETFs?
Yes, But With Fine Print The SpaceX IPO is scheduled to debut on Friday, June 12, on the Nasdaq exchange under the ticker SPCX.
Priced at $135 per share, the offering is expected to raise roughly $75 billion and imply a valuation somewhere between $1.75 trillion and $2 trillion.
If those figures hold, it would easily rank among the largest ...
